title: Twist Bioscience Q3 2025 slides: revenue hits $96.1M as margins exceed 50% target
text: Twist Bioscience reported Q3 FY2025 results demonstrating progress toward profitability. The synthetic biology company achieved revenue of $96.1 million, meeting guidance expectations. Notably, gross margin exceeded the 50% target ahead of schedule with results showing a 53.4% gross margin. The company posted an adjusted EBITDA loss of $8.0 million, beating its $13 million loss guidance. The company benefited from a $48.8 million gain on a business sale, contributing to net income of $20.4 million. Cash and short-term investments totaled $250.8 million as of June 30, 2025. Three operating segments showed year-over-year growth: NGS Read generated $55.3 million (27% growth), benefiting from expanded collaboration with Element Biosciences; SynBio Write contributed $35.2 million (7% growth), with approximately 237,000 genes shipped during the quarter; and Biopharma Solutions posted $5.6 million in revenue (10% growth) with $6.2 million in orders. The company demonstrated consistent improvement in financial metrics. Adjusted EBITDA losses have declined from $29.6 million in Q3 2023 to $8.0 million currently, while gross margins expanded from 34.4% to 53.4% during the same period. For Q4 FY2025, Twist projects revenue of $96-98 million with 51-52% gross margins. Full fiscal year 2025 guidance anticipates $374-376 million in revenue with adjusted EBITDA losses of $45-47 million, aligning with the company's goal to achieve EBITDA breakeven by fiscal 2026.
